org.fdroid.fdroid.name: F-Droid
org.fdroid.fdroid.notes: Open-source Android app store. Installer/package-query permissions can be expected.

org.telegram.messenger.name: Telegram
org.telegram.messenger.notes: Chat apps commonly request microphone, camera, contacts, notifications, and network permissions.

com.simplemobiletools.filemanager.name: Simple File Manager
com.simplemobiletools.filemanager.notes: File managers commonly request broad storage access.
